displayDescription.en:
In 2017, Ashish Vaswani and colleagues introduced the Transformer in Attention Is All You Need. Multi-head self-attention compared queries, keys, and values across sequence positions, while feed-forward layers, residual connections, and positional encodings formed an encoder-decoder architecture without recurrence or convolution.

Self-attention allowed whole sequences to be processed in parallel during training and shortened the computational path between distant pieces of information. The original paper achieved stronger machine-translation quality with substantially lower training cost. The Transformer subsequently became the shared architectural foundation of BERT, GPT, vision transformers, multimodal foundation models, and modern generative AI.
displayDescription.zh:
2017 年，阿希什·瓦斯瓦尼等人在《Attention Is All You Need》中提出 Transformer。它用多头自注意力比较序列中不同位置的 query、key 和 value，并配合前馈网络、残差连接和位置编码，构成不依赖循环或卷积的编码器—解码器。

自注意力允许训练时并行处理整段序列，缩短远距离信息之间的计算路径。原论文在机器翻译基准上取得更高质量，同时显著减少训练成本。Transformer 随后成为 BERT、GPT、视觉 Transformer、多模态基础模型和现代生成式 AI 的共同架构基础。

category.en: Deep Learning and the Unification of Paradigms (2010s-2020s)
category.zh: 深度学习与范式归一（2010年代至2020年代）

quote.en: "The Transformer replaced recurrence and convolution with self-attention, creating a scalable architecture that became the foundation for modern language models."
quote.zh: "Transformer 用自注意力替代循环和卷积，形成了一种可扩展架构，并成为现代语言模型的基础。"

workTitle.zh: 注意力就是你所需要的一切

quotePage.en: NeurIPS 2017 paper: Attention Is All You Need
quotePage.zh: NeurIPS 2017 论文《注意力就是你所需要的一切》

quoteAttribution.en: Attention Is All You Need, Ashish Vaswani et al., NeurIPS, 2017
quoteAttribution.zh: 《注意力就是你所需要的一切》, 阿希什·瓦斯瓦尼等，NeurIPS，2017

demo.en: Every token builds query-key-value attention links to other tokens, allowing parallel sequence modeling.
demo.zh: 每个令牌与其他令牌建立 query-key-value 注意力连接，从而实现并行序列建模。

text.en: Tokens exchange information through learned attention weights.
text.zh: 令牌通过学习到的注意力权重交换信息。

text.en: Sequence positions can be processed without recurrence.
text.zh: 序列位置无需循环即可处理。

text.en: Every token builds query-key-value attention links to other tokens, allowing parallel sequence modeling.
text.zh: 每个令牌与其他令牌建立 query-key-value 注意力连接，从而实现并行序列建模。

description.en: Open paper for the Transformer architecture.

license.en: Reference link only; local explainers are original redraws.
license.zh: 仅作为参考链接；本地解释图为原创重绘。

html.en: The Transformer replaced recurrent sequence modeling with stacked self-attention and feed-forward blocks. Introduced for machine translation, it became the architecture behind BERT, GPT-style language models, multimodal foundation models, and many modern AI systems.
html.zh: Transformer 用堆叠的自注意力和前馈模块替代循环序列建模。它最初用于机器翻译，后来成为 BERT、GPT 式语言模型、多模态基础模型以及许多现代 AI 系统背后的架构。

html.en: Every token builds query-key-value attention links to other tokens, allowing parallel sequence modeling. The interactive demo focuses on the steps that connect the source material to the visible system behavior.
html.zh: 每个令牌与其他令牌建立 query-key-value 注意力连接，从而实现并行序列建模。 互动演示会突出这些步骤如何把资料线索与可见的系统行为连接起来。

html.en: Experts generally treat the Transformer as one of the defining architectures of modern AI. Its long-term legacy is the scalable self-attention recipe that reorganized natural language processing, vision, speech, code, agents, and foundation-model research.
html.zh: 专家通常把 Transformer 视为现代 AI 的定义性架构之一。它的长期影响在于可扩展的自注意力配方重塑了自然语言处理、视觉、语音、代码、智能体和基础模型研究。
